description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with three stages: build, test, and deploy. Add a my_build_job_1 job in the build stage that runs `/bin/echo This is a mock build job`. Add three test stage jobs—my_build_job_2, my_build_job_2b, and my_build_job_2c—each running `/bin/echo This is a mock test job`. Add a my_build_job_3 job in the deploy stage that runs `/bin/echo This is a mock deploy job` followed by `ls -lh /tmp/build /tmp/test`. Use the default runner image and no caches, artifacts, or special rules.
